## Summary

Describe the change and the scientific workflow it supports.

## Checklist

- [ ] Exact deduplication remains distinct from approximate clustering.
- [ ] Original IDs, headers, counts, and duplicate group membership are preserved.
- [ ] Local-only browser processing is preserved.
- [ ] No analytics, tracking, uploads, or hidden network calls were added.
- [ ] Validation tests were added or updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] README, tutorials, blog, or methods text were updated when user-facing behavior changed.

## Validation

List commands run, browser checks, and any fixture files used.
